summary: Iteration 3 verified the new admin panel, license-key fulfillment, email outbox queue, leads form, browse bar, alias category pages, phone country code, Buy Now, About-page Email Us, and post-payment thank-you UI. Backend: 24/24 pytest pass — extended /app/backend/tests/test_admin.py with two new tests (order status PATCH transitions + invalid 400/404, and explicit queued status for email outbox with RESEND_API_KEY empty). Frontend on https preview: admin login → /admin renders 6 stat cards (37/29/1/8/3/5), Products tab edit, Keys tab inventory add (key visible immediately), Orders/Leads/Emails tabs all reachable. Chat launcher pill text is 'UCODE SOFTTECH AI — Ask Anything' and header-ask-ai present; lead form (chat-lead-form) submits via lead-callback-btn — form disappears and live-support/'agent will call you' message shows; lead persisted in admin Leads. Home browse-toggle-bar has 18 chips; alias categories work: antivirus=7 products, office=21, office-for-windows=13, mcafee-antivirus=1; microsoft-office-2016 chip correctly routes to /shop. Product detail Buy Now → /cart. email-us-btn (product) and about-email-btn (/about-us) both navigate to /page/contact-us. /page/installation-guide and /page/contact-us render fine. Checkout phone-code-select is a shadcn Select (not native) with 12 country options including +44 which we successfully selected — trigger updates to '🇬🇧 +44'. CheckoutSuccess source confirmed to have order-number/installation-guide-btn/success-call-btn/success-email-btn/success-chat-btn + 'Thanks for purchasing with us' + 'check your email' copy; visible only on a verified paid session (already E2E-tested in iteration 2). Mocks honored: RESEND_API_KEY empty → emails stored as 'queued' (verified in pytest + UI).

minor.issue: Query-string category filter is ignored — endpoint returns all 37 products regardless of ?category=. Frontend filters client-side via CategoryPage.categoryFilters so user-visible category pages still work, but the API parameter is misleading. Consider implementing the filter or removing the param.

issues: Guest /api/auth/me probe still emits a 401 console error on every page load (carried from iter 2). Cosmetic — wrap probe to silently swallow 401.

phone-code-select is a shadcn Select component, not a native <select> — automation should click the trigger and pick role=option items rather than select_option(). Not a defect, just an integration note for downstream tests.

action_items: (Minor) Either implement the ?category= query filter on /api/products or remove the parameter and document client-side filtering.
(Cosmetic, carried from iter 2) Silence guest /api/auth/me 401 console noise — wrap in try/catch in AuthContext.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin routes correctly require_admin and return 401 for guests + 403 for non-admin (verified).
Fulfillment is idempotent: resend-email triggers fulfill_order only when not yet fulfilled; otherwise re-sends. Good.
emails.py correctly stores 'queued' status when RESEND_API_KEY is empty and attaches the note 'RESEND_API_KEY not configured — email stored for later delivery' — matches the intentional mock.
CategoryPage filter for 'antivirus' alias matches bitdefender|mcafee — works as designed.
CheckoutSuccess shows new thank-you content only after order status is confirmed paid via /payments/checkout/status — correct guarding.
test_credentials: Admin admin@ucodesofttechus.com / Admin@UC2026! verified working. Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 verified in iter 2.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_/STAT/QUE/FULF-prefixed license keys + a few throwaway orders (status@test.com, queued@test.com, fulfil@test.com, lead@test.com). All visible in admin tabs; harmless for next runs (idempotent uuid suffixes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v` for 24-test regression. test_admin.py now also covers PATCH order status + queued email status. New feature flows fully validated on https preview URL. Two real (paid) flow points were NOT exercised in this iteration because they were validated in iter 2: (a) full Stripe redirect + 4242 card payment showing new thank-you content with order-number/installation-guide-btn/etc., (b) admin /admin order row becoming paid+fulfilled with key visible. Source code confirms testids exist; if a future change suspects regression, do a live Stripe purchase. The 1¢ Stripe rounding bug noted in iter 2 was not in scope for this iteration.
rca of the issue: GET /api/products?category=<slug> ignores the query param: server.py (or routes/products) likely accepts the param but does not pass it to the Mongo filter — verified via curl showing 37 results for ?category=antivirus and ?category=office. No user-facing impact because CategoryPage does client-side filtering on product name patterns, but it's misleading API behavior. Fix: add `if category: query['category']=category` in the products list endpoint, OR remove the unused param from the route signature.
